![alt text](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/68957369/400493983-2273d44d-f296-4a3e-9c76-e61ac5ce4eca.png?jwt=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..-icUyZ0sLT_iEGP83NN5YOKZlV6TXp3kzxmRsefArMg)

linux distribution for Artificial intelligence specific tasks,implemented single Gpu passthrough and multi GPU pass through to enhance AI workload performance, optimizing the distribution for virtualized and bare-metal environments.

Built using the live-build tool, ensuring automation, scalability, and CI/CD pipelines for consistent OS builds and reliable deployments in both cloud and on-premise environments.

Utilized Azure VPS to update applications, maintain the operating system, and test deployments, demonstrating expertise in
cloud platforms.
